name: cottontail
description: Tiny Zig-based JavaScript runtime scaffold for Electrobun.
author: Blackboard Technologies Inc.

scripts.check-zig-version: bun run setup && node scripts/zig.js version
scripts.build: bun run setup && node scripts/zig.js build
scripts.build:release: bun run setup && node scripts/zig.js build -Doptimize=ReleaseSmall
scripts.compat:surface:all: bun run compat:surface && bun run compat:surface:view
scripts.compat:upstream: bun run build && node scripts/run-upstream-tests.js all
scripts.compat:upstream:xfail: bun run build && node scripts/run-upstream-tests.js all --include-expected-failures
scripts.test:zig: bun run setup && node scripts/zig.js build test
scripts.test: bun run test:zig && bun run test:js
scripts.test:blocking: bun run test && bun run test:electrobun && bun run test:electrobun:cli
scripts.push:beta: bun run test:blocking && bun scripts/push-version.js beta
scripts.push:patch: bun run test:blocking && bun scripts/push-version.js patch
scripts.push:minor: bun run test:blocking && bun scripts/push-version.js minor
scripts.push:major: bun run test:blocking && bun scripts/push-version.js major
scripts.push:stable: bun run test:blocking && bun scripts/push-version.js stable
